song.title: What About My Sinful Past
song.lyrics: [V1] .D G What about my sinful past? .D G And my conscience has no rest. .D G Deep within I feel the pain . D A G A I'm condemned from all my guilty stains. [V2] .D G O my life of misery, .D G In this world of vanity .D G As I searched for happiness . D A G A My reward I received just emptiness. [P] .D Em A God was far away from me, .Em A D D Great and highest One is He .Bm F#m G Em Yet You took on humanity, . D Bm You came for me, . Em A Hung on a tree . A7 D D7 Bled there to die for me. [C] . G Em A That's why I love Him, . D Bm That's why I treasure Him. . Em A D That's why I give my life and all to Him.| (repeat) [C2] . G Em A That's why I love Him, . D Bm That's why I treasure Him. . Em A D That's why I give my life and all to Him.
